strategy_summary: Electric organs of rajid skates help defend against predators or stun prey by generating electricity. “Much weaker voltages are generated by other fish, including bottom-dwelling marine rajid skates, whose electric organs are in their tails.
mechanism:
Electric organs of rajid skates help defend against predators or stun prey by generating electricity.

“Much weaker voltages are generated by other fish, including bottom-dwelling marine rajid skates, whose electric organs are in their tails. (Shuker 2001: 53)
